reviews.comment:
Tienen afluencia masiva de gente pero tardan en atenderte como en la verdulería del pueblo. No cargo más ahí

(Translated by Google)
They're incredibly busy, but the service is as slow as at the local greengrocer's. I'm not buying anything else there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvOFBEQlVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio. Era finde largo había mucha gente y un solo cajero en el serviclub. Cola de más de media hora para un café !!

(Translated by Google)
Very clean. It was a long weekend, there were lots of people and only one cashier at the service club. The line for a coffee was over half an hour long!
